mitigation.title: Fix config file permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening config file permissions.

mitigation.title: Fix config directory permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening config directory permissions.

mitigation.title: Enable secret redaction
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling security.redact_secrets.

mitigation.title: 评估本地执行边界
mitigation.description: 本地终端后端会直接在宿主机执行命令。条件允许时，建议迁移到更安全的执行后端。
mitigation.description_en: Local terminal backend runs commands directly on host. Consider moving to a safer execution backend where possible.

items.action: 确认此 Hermes 实例是否必须在宿主机执行工具
items.action_en: Review whether this Hermes instance should execute tools on the local host
items.detail: 确认当前工作负载是否确实需要宿主机级命令执行。
items.detail_en: Confirm host-level command execution is required for this workload.

items.action: 为本地终端后端使用更严格的审批策略
items.action_en: Use stricter approval policies for local terminal backend
items.detail: 强制启用审批闸门，降低直接在宿主机执行带来的风险。
items.detail_en: Enforce gated approvals to reduce direct host-side execution risk.

mitigation.title: Re-enable approval gating
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by setting approvals.mode to a gated mode.

mitigation.title: 检查自定义端点暴露
mitigation.description: 如果端点归属不清晰，自定义非本地 base_url 可能绕过预期信任边界。
mitigation.description_en: A custom non-local base_url can bypass expected trust boundaries if endpoint ownership is unclear.

items.action: 校验自定义模型端点的归属与 TLS 设置
items.action_en: Validate ownership and TLS settings of custom model endpoint
items.detail: 确保端点证书、域名归属和传输安全符合策略要求。
items.detail_en: Ensure endpoint certificate, domain ownership, and transport security meet policy.

items.action: 条件允许时优先使用本地或私网端点
items.action_en: Prefer local or private network endpoint where feasible
items.detail: 将模型流量路由到可信内部基础设施，减少外部暴露。
items.detail_en: Reduce external exposure by routing model traffic to trusted internal infrastructure.
